item.title: "Stop Putting Secrets in Your Repo. Seriously."
item.description:
• devops
  • terraform
  • secops
  • dataengineering category: blog author: samreghenzi description: "How we integrated OCI Vault with Terraform to manage secrets properly — and why the side effects are even better than the main benefit."

OK. We've all been there. You're setting up a new microservice, you need a database connection string, a …
item.dc:creator: Sam Reghenzi

item.title: "Forecasting Time Series from a COVID-19 Red Zone"
item.description:
• ML category: blog author: samreghenzi

Hello, dear citizen of the free world. I’m writing while I’m in a restricted lifestyle. On Monday night Italy’s prime minister decided that the entire country would be covered by restrictions that can be summarised as follows:

“I stay at home”

All …
